name: Banana Split Sundae Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 cups low-fat vanilla ice cream, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, bananas, egg whites, and vanilla. Mix until well combined.
3. In another mixing bowl, combine rolled oats, flour, sugar, baking soda, and chocolate chips. Mix dry ingredients until just incorporated.
4. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until moistened, but not batter-like.
5. Drop 1/4 cup measuring scoops of dough onto an unprepared baking sheet, spacing them about 3 inches apart.
6. Spread each scoop to a diameter of approximately 3 1/2 inches.
7. Bake for 14 minutes or until lightly browned. Allow cooling on the baking sheet for one minute before transferring to a wire rack.
